input.prompt: Create a summary of the project architecture and save it as a text file in my Downloads/shinobu directory.
Create a summary of the project architecture and save it as a text file in my Downloads/shinobu directory.

subtasks.title: Read project architecture content
subtasks.description: Access and retrieve the full content of the project architecture document or source material to be summarized.

subtasks.title: Summarize project architecture
subtasks.description: Analyze the retrieved content and generate a concise, coherent summary highlighting key components, structure, and relationships within the project architecture.

subtasks.title: Create text file with summary
subtasks.description: Save the generated summary into a new text file named 'summary.txt' in the directory '~/Downloads/shinobu/'.
